Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH4 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ 15D/CTS  15/VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/SA2: 509 MINNA ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAIT TO ADD COUNT #4, PC 452(C), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: #4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:ACM DENY RELEASE DUE TO DEFENDANT NOT BEINGAMENABLE/X:DEFENDANT'S PROBATION OFFICER FROM CONTRA COSTA COUNTY PATRICIAVARGAS APPEARED VIA ZOON IN OPEN COURT/X:THE DEFENDANT'S PARNTER, CHELSEABROWN APPEARED IN OPEN COURT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TOBE ON HOME DETENTION AND TO REMAIN IN HIS PREMISES, EXCEPT FOR MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES AND MEDICAL APPOINTMENTS/RX/WS/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO NOT POSSESSANY INCENDIARY DEVICES/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATEDPICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE COURT VACATES THE FUTURE PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 02-19-21 IN M09/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1 HOUR/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 02-19-21 (30TH)/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 03-08-21/987,2/BAIL:100,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSIONFOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/SA2:509 MINNA ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:EST 1 HR/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:BOTH COUNSELS ARE APPEARING THROUGH ZOOM/CONT/DOP/X:EST 1 HOUR/
